THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITE, ROBERT CURTIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 205 JONES STREET,M #210, SF, CA 94102, STAYED UNTIL AUG-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT FOR $1,137.50 IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE BY 8/1/94 5PM. IF HE DOES, THIS AMOUNT IS WAIVED. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
